DESCRIPTION: Verify that authentication fails with invalid password and returns Bad credentials
NAME: shouldNotBeAbleToCreateTokenWithInvalidPassword

DESCRIPTION: Verify that a booking can be deleted successfully with valid authentication
NAME: shouldBeAbleToDeleteBookingSuccessfully

DESCRIPTION: Verify that creating a booking fails when mandatory field firstname is missing
NAME: shouldNotBeAbleToCreateBookingWithMissingFirstname

DESCRIPTION: Verify the health check endpoint confirms the API is up and running
NAME: shouldConfirmApiIsUpAndRunning

DESCRIPTION: Verify that retrieving a booking with a non-existent ID returns 404
NAME: shouldNotBeAbleToGetBookingWithNonExistentId

DESCRIPTION: Verify booking lifecycle with partial update: Create Token -> Create Booking -> Retrieve Booking -> Partially Update Booking -> Retrieve Updated Booking -> Delete Booking
NAME: shouldCompleteBookingLifecycleWithPartialUpdateSuccessfully

DESCRIPTION: Verify that authentication fails when username field is missing from the payload
NAME: shouldNotBeAbleToCreateTokenWithMissingUsername

DESCRIPTION: Verify that updating a booking without an authentication token returns Forbidden
NAME: shouldNotBeAbleToUpdateBookingWithoutAuthenticationToken

DESCRIPTION: Verify that retrieving a booking with invalid non-numeric ID returns 404
NAME: shouldNotBeAbleToGetBookingWithInvalidId

DESCRIPTION: Verify that booking IDs can be filtered by firstname and lastname query parameters
NAME: shouldBeAbleToFilterBookingsByName

DESCRIPTION: Verify that a new booking can be created successfully with valid and complete data
NAME: shouldBeAbleToCreateBookingWithValidData

DESCRIPTION: Verify that a specific booking can be retrieved successfully using a valid booking ID
NAME: shouldBeAbleToGetBookingById

DESCRIPTION: Verify that partially updating a booking with an empty request body returns an error or no change
NAME: shouldNotChangeBookingWhenPartialUpdateBodyIsEmpty

DESCRIPTION: Verify that a user can successfully create an authentication token with valid credentials
NAME: shouldBeAbleToCreateTokenWithValidCredentials

DESCRIPTION: Verify that deleting a booking without authentication returns Forbidden
NAME: shouldNotBeAbleToDeleteBookingWithoutAuthentication

DESCRIPTION: Verify complete booking lifecycle: Create Token -> Create Booking -> Retrieve Booking -> Update Booking -> Delete Booking -> Confirm Deletion
NAME: shouldCompleteBookingLifecycleSuccessfully

DESCRIPTION: Verify that a booking can be partially updated successfully with valid authentication
NAME: shouldBeAbleToPartiallyUpdateBookingSuccessfully

DESCRIPTION: Verify that a booking can be fully updated successfully with valid authentication
NAME: shouldBeAbleToUpdateBookingSuccessfully

DESCRIPTION: Verify that all existing booking IDs can be retrieved successfully
NAME: shouldBeAbleToGetAllBookings

DESCRIPTION: Verify that updating a booking with an invalid token returns Forbidden
NAME: shouldNotBeAbleToUpdateBookingWithInvalidToken
